instructions.original_snippets: All commands must use the `run.py` wrapper to ensure proper environment
NEVER guess or use generic descriptions! If details missing, use Smart Add to discover them.
Every NotebookLM answer ends with: EXTREMELY IMPORTANT: Is that ALL you need to know? Required Claude Behavior: STOP, ANALYZE, IDENTIFY GAPS, ASK FOLLOW-UP, REPEAT, SYNTHESIZE
See references/api_reference.md for full parameter documentation for all scripts
All data stored in ~/.claude/skills/notebooklm/data/ — Protected by .gitignore, never commit to git
Rate limit: 50 queries per day per Google account
Browser MUST be visible for authentication — user must manually log in to Google
